# programs.rofi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.rofi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.rofi.configPath` | `non-empty string` | Path where to put generated configuration file. |
| `programs.rofi.cycle` | `null or boolean` | Whether to cycle through the results list. |
| `programs.rofi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Rofi: A window switcher, application launcher and dmenu replacement. |
| `programs.rofi.extraConfig` | `attribute set of ((attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string) or list of (string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string)))) or string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string) or list of (string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string)))` | Additional configuration to add. |
| `programs.rofi.finalPackage` | `package` | Resulting customized rofi package. |
| `programs.rofi.font` | `null or string` | Font to use. |
| `programs.rofi.location` | `one of "bottom", "bottom-left", "bottom-right", "center", "left", "right", "top", "top-left", "top-right"` | The location rofi appears on the screen. |
| `programs.rofi.modes` | `list of (string or (submodule))` | Modes to enable. For custom modes see `man 5 rofi-script`. |
| `programs.rofi.package` | `package` | The rofi package to use. |
| `programs.rofi.pass.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rofi integration with password-store. |
| `programs.rofi.pass.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration to be added at to the rofi-pass config file. Additional examples can be found at <https://github.com/carnager/rofi-pass/blob/master/config.example>. |
| `programs.rofi.pass.package` | `null or package` | The rofi-pass package to use. |
| `programs.rofi.pass.stores` | `list of string` | Directory roots of your password-stores. |
| `programs.rofi.plugins` | `list of package` | List of rofi plugins to be installed. |
| `programs.rofi.terminal` | `null or string` | Path to the terminal which will be used to run console applications |
| `programs.rofi.theme` | `null or string or absolute path or attribute set of ((attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string) or list of (string or signed integer or boolean or (Rasi literal string)))) or string)` | Name of theme or path to theme file in rasi format or attribute set with theme configuration. Available named themes can be viewed using the {command}`rofi-theme-selector` tool. |
| `programs.rofi.xoffset` | `signed integer` | Offset in the x-axis in pixels relative to the chosen location. |
| `programs.rofi.yoffset` | `signed integer` | Offset in the y-axis in pixels relative to the chosen location. |
